d4p1:LocalizedLabel.d4p1:Label: Unique identifier of the user who created the record.

d4p1:UserLocalizedLabel.d4p1:Label: Unique identifier of the user who created the record.

d4p1:LocalizedLabel.d4p1:Label: Date and time when the record was created.

d4p1:UserLocalizedLabel.d4p1:Label: Date and time when the record was created.

d4p1:LocalizedLabel.d4p1:Label: Unique identifier of the delegate user who created the record.

d4p1:UserLocalizedLabel.d4p1:Label: Unique identifier of the delegate user who created the record.

d4p1:LocalizedLabel.d4p1:Label: Value of the Currency in base currency.

d4p1:UserLocalizedLabel.d4p1:Label: Value of the Currency in base currency.

d4p1:LocalizedLabel.d4p1:Label: Exchange rate for the currency associated with the entity with respect to the base currency.
Wechselkurs für die Währung, die der Entität im Hinblick auf die Basiswährung zugeordnet ist.

d4p1:UserLocalizedLabel.d4p1:Label: Exchange rate for the currency associated with the entity with respect to the base currency.

d4p1:LocalizedLabel.d4p1:Label: Sequence number of the import that created this record.

d4p1:UserLocalizedLabel.d4p1:Label: Sequence number of the import that created this record.

d4p1:LocalizedLabel.d4p1:Label: Unique identifier of the user who modified the record.

d4p1:UserLocalizedLabel.d4p1:Label: Unique identifier of the user who modified the record.

d4p1:LocalizedLabel.d4p1:Label: Date and time when the record was modified.

d4p1:UserLocalizedLabel.d4p1:Label: Date and time when the record was modified.

d4p1:LocalizedLabel.d4p1:Label: Unique identifier of the delegate user who modified the record.

d4p1:UserLocalizedLabel.d4p1:Label: Unique identifier of the delegate user who modified the record.

d4p1:LocalizedLabel.d4p1:Label: Date and time that the record was migrated.

d4p1:UserLocalizedLabel.d4p1:Label: Date and time that the record was migrated.

d4p1:LocalizedLabel.d4p1:Label: Unique identifier for the business unit that owns the record

d4p1:UserLocalizedLabel.d4p1:Label: Unique identifier for the business unit that owns the record

d4p1:LocalizedLabel.d4p1:Label: Unique identifier for the team that owns the record.

d4p1:UserLocalizedLabel.d4p1:Label: Unique identifier for the team that owns the record.

d4p1:LocalizedLabel.d4p1:Label: Unique identifier for the user that owns the record.

d4p1:UserLocalizedLabel.d4p1:Label: Unique identifier for the user that owns the record.

d4p1:LocalizedLabel.d4p1:Label: Reason for the status of the TestTable

d4p1:UserLocalizedLabel.d4p1:Label: Reason for the status of the TestTable

d5p1:LocalizedLabel.d5p1:Label: Reason for the status of the TestTable

d5p1:UserLocalizedLabel.d5p1:Label: Reason for the status of the TestTable

d4p1:LocalizedLabel.d4p1:Label: Unique identifier of the currency associated with the entity.
Eindeutiger Bezeichner der Währung, die der Entität zugeordnet ist.

d4p1:UserLocalizedLabel.d4p1:Label: Unique identifier of the currency associated with the entity.

d4p1:LocalizedLabel.d4p1:Label: Time zone code that was in use when the record was created.

d4p1:UserLocalizedLabel.d4p1:Label: Time zone code that was in use when the record was created.
